ai_summary: Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited (ABREL) announced its 129th Annual General Meeting (AGM) for July 27, 2026, to be held virtually, alongside the electronic dissemination of its FY 2025-26 Integrated Annual Report. The company also declared a dividend of Rs. 2.50 per share, with a record date of July 14, 2026, and payout after July 30, 2026 (subject to approval), impacting shareholders who must ensure KYC compliance and registered email addresses for seamless access and payment. No material red flags are apparent, as the company is following standard digital disclosure and virtual meeting protocols.
